calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/K. Shaw, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Elizabeth Ying Ying Xiong, present in pro per with Cantonese Interpreter: Nelson Mok.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined. Petition filed by minor, not by parents/guardians. Court advises that the Petition must be amended in order to include the parents on the petition. The matter is taken off calendar and litigants are directed to go to the Access Center for legal advice.
